h1: Custom Insect Repellent for Outdoor Events & Workplace Safety
metaTitle: Custom Insect Repellent for Promos | Perfect Imprints
metaDescription: Protect your team and guests with custom insect repellent. Perfect for outdoor events, safety kits, and giveaways. Order bulk from Perfect Imprints.
introHtml:
Whether you're planning a company picnic, a trade show booth at an outdoor event, or distributing safety kits to field workers, keeping mosquitoes and bugs at bay is a practical concern. That's where custom insect repellent comes in. Unlike disposable wipes or sprays that get lost in a drawer, these branded items are used repeatedly, keeping your logo in front of recipients all season long.

From beeswax-based balms like Bee Balm and Man Balm to soothing after-bite treatments like Fun Sun Kit and Aria Candle, this category includes a range of products that repel insects or relieve bites. Many are made with natural ingredients like citronella, lemongrass, and essential oils, making them safe for outdoor use. Products like Bandana and Big Bandana can be treated with insect repellent or simply offer a physical barrier. Eye Mask provides a cooling relief for tired eyes.

All items are fully customizable with your logo or message, using methods like screen printing, laser engraving, or full-color labels. Minimum order quantities vary by product, but most are available in quantities that work for corporate events, employee onboarding, or customer appreciation. Perfect Imprints makes it easy to order in bulk and get your brand noticed while keeping people protected.

faqs.q: What customization options are available for insect repellent?
faqs.a: You can add your logo via screen printing, laser engraving, or full-color labels depending on the product. Bee Balm and Man Balm often accept imprint on the tin or label. Bandanas can be screen printed with your design.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom insect repellent?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by product. Most items like lip balms and bandanas start at 50–100 units. Contact Perfect Imprints for specific MOQs on items like Fun Sun Kit or Aria Candle.

faqs.q: Are these insect repellents safe for sensitive skin?
faqs.a: Products like Bee Balm and Man Balm use natural ingredients such as citronella and beeswax. Always check the ingredient list for potential allergens. We recommend patch testing for sensitive skin.

faqs.q: How long does production and shipping take?
faqs.a: Typical production lead time is 5–10 business days after artwork approval. Shipping time depends on your location and chosen method. Rush orders may be available — ask your account manager.

faqs.q: Can I order a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, samples are available for most products. You can request a blank or imprinted sample to evaluate quality before committing to a large quantity. Contact sales for pricing.

heroAltText: Custom insect repellent products like Bee Balm, Bandana, and Fun Sun Kit with logo imprint for outdoor events and giveaways
